title: We built a cleaner way to inspect a bot strategy before touching it. What metric would you want first?
author: Carter_LW
selftext:
Most bot pages still feel like they were written to impress beginners instead of help traders judge risk.

We started laying out the strategy curve, benchmark, drawdown, runtime, and logic in one place so you can reject bad stuff faster.

If you were opening a strategy page cold, what would you want to see first?
